task: Docs-only design spec for Finance Hub FH-1 (Fixed Assets + Depreciation) — the foundation block. Closes the QBO gap: QBO does NOT auto-post depreciation (its Advanced fixed-asset module computes a schedule but the user posts JEs manually). FH-1 = asset register (add one/bulk/import) + per-asset depreciation schedule engine (straight-line, 150DB, DDB, bonus/Section 179) + back-dating with prior-accumulated-depreciation + half-month convention + GATED cron that auto-posts Dr Depreciation Expense / Cr Accumulated Depreciation on the 1st (flag default OFF, idempotent, preview-first, double-entry balances or fails). Land non-depreciating. Asset lifecycle acquisition->depreciation->disposal with gain/loss. Data model (fixed_assets.assets/asset_classes/depreciation_schedules/disposals), screen (GUARD mocks), open questions, gated build sequence. Supersedes the earlier standalone DEPRECIATION note. NO code, no DDL, no posting, no cron. VOID != DELETE. Designed live with Jorge + GUARD-verifies-vs-QuickBooks before merge.
